reviews.comment:
Muy sucios los baños. Excelente la atención del chico que creo se llama Claudio pero no daba abasto en plena temporada él solo cargando el agua para cada termo, cobrando, explicando, era demasiado. Te cobran 100 pesos por el agua caliente.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are very dirty. The service from the guy I think is named Claudio was excellent, but he couldn't keep up with the high season, carrying water to each water heater, charging, and explaining—it was too much. They charge 100 pesos for hot water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdHJyRE13EAE

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza la higiene de los baños exteriores. No sabia que los socios disponíamos de baños impecables en el interior. De todos modos...quien por alli pasa dirá que fue a los baños del ACA  en el Bolsón y la impresión que se lleva la gente no es buena. Es un detalle a tener en cuenta. Gracias!

(Translated by Google)
The hygiene of the outdoor restrooms is a disgrace. I didn't know members had access to spotless restrooms inside. Anyway...anyone passing by will say they've been to the ACA restrooms in El Bolsón, and the impression people get isn't good. It's something to keep in mind. Thanks!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNW82M0hBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Pedimos un sanguche completo de pollo y uno de carne, con una porción de papas y una coca. Todo nos salió 2800 pesos y fue EXCELENTE. La carne se cortaba sola. Súper limpio todo, los baños impecables. La mejor parada

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. We ordered a full chicken sandwich and a beef sandwich, with a side of fries and a coke. The whole thing cost 2,800 pesos and was EXCELLENT. The meat sliced ​​itself. Everything was super clean, the bathrooms spotless. The best stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCc3NuVlN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos a comer y a cambiar el filtro de la camioneta. Pedimos 2 sandwiches de bondiola al horno $1200c/u, 2 tostados de salvado $600c/u y un sandwich de pollo a la plancha $1200. El agua de 1.65l $400

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for lunch and to change the truck's air filter. We ordered two oven-baked pork shoulder sandwiches ($1200 each), two whole wheat toasties ($600 each), and one grilled chicken sandwich ($1200). A 1.65L bottle of water cost $400.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeEpyU0tBEAE
